title: The Sour Receipt
hook: Stella holds up a wet receipt and says, "Marco, why is your name on a drink order from before you entered the villa?"
stakes: The winner of the first challenge gets the Golden Peel bracelet and chooses first at recoupling.
cliffhanger: The receipt is not signed by Marco or Stella. It is signed by Benny, the host.
part_2_payoff: Part 2 opens with Benny admitting he invited Marco early as a loyalty test, then reveals Stella agreed because she wanted Perry Peach to show jealousy. The bigger twist is that Bella's 2:13 a.m. audio includes Gina's laugh.

characters.name: Stella Strawberry
characters.motive: Look sweet while controlling the first vote.
characters.secret: She helped Marco rehearse his entrance before the show.
characters.visual_lock: Humanoid strawberry woman, glossy red seed-textured fruit head, expressive green eyes, lashes, leaf hair bow, gold hoops, fitted tropical dress, human-like hands, confident camera-ready posture.

characters.name: Mango Marco
characters.secret: He entered the villa before his official arrival and panicked when the receipt could expose it.
characters.visual_lock: Humanoid mango man, golden mango-shaped head, expressive eyebrows, athletic human-like body, open linen shirt, shell necklace, resort shorts, charming but nervous smile.

characters.name: Bella Blueberry
characters.motive: Protect herself by noticing every production clue.
characters.secret: She records every confessional door click after being blindsided in a previous villa.
characters.visual_lock: Humanoid blueberry woman, glossy round blueberry head, sparkly lashes, blue-toned body, tiny microphone charm, metallic mini dress, detective-gossip energy.

characters.name: Gina Grape
characters.motive: Expose who came for love and who came for screen time.
characters.secret: She arrived during rehearsal day and heard more than she admits.
characters.visual_lock: Humanoid grape wildcard, grape-cluster head, theatrical eyes, glossy purple body, star earrings, fitted evening outfit, hand-on-hip posture.

characters.name: Benny Banana
characters.motive: Run the villa like a comic game master while hiding producer-level influence.
characters.secret: He signed the 2:16 a.m. smoothie receipt.
characters.visual_lock: Humanoid banana host, tall banana-shaped head, athletic yellow body, peel tuxedo jacket, lapel mic, sunglasses, broad showman gestures.

dialogue: Stella: Marco, why is your name on a drink order from before you entered the villa?
scenes.caption: He was not supposed to be here yet.
scenes.visual_action: Stella Strawberry slaps a wet smoothie-bar receipt onto a glass table. Mango Marco smiles for half a second, then loses it. Bella Blueberry leans into frame.
scenes.video_prompt: Vertical 9:16 premium animated reality-show scene. Stella Strawberry slaps a wet smoothie-bar receipt onto a glass table in a tropical fruit villa. Mango Marco smiles, then his expression drops. Bella Blueberry leans into frame. Humanoid fruit characters with expressive eyes and mouths, human-like bodies, hands, wardrobe, detailed peel texture, sunset pool lighting, shallow depth of field, reality-TV push-in, no logos, no watermarks.

scenes.voiceover: Twelve hours earlier, Mango Marco walked in like the villa had already voted for him.
dialogue: Marco: I do not chase attention. Attention just gets thirsty.
scenes.caption: Notice Stella's reaction.
scenes.visual_action: Marco steps through palm shadows in an open linen shirt. Stella claps too late, like she recognizes him and is trying to hide it.
scenes.video_prompt: Vertical 9:16 bombshell villa entrance. Mango Marco walks through palm shadows toward the pool with relaxed confidence. Stella Strawberry claps two beats late and hides recognition. Warm sunset, handheld reality-show camera, cinematic fruit-human hybrid bodies, detailed clothing and hands.

dialogue: Bella: Everyone screamed when Marco came in. Stella did not scream. She counted to two, then screamed. That is not excitement. That is math.
scenes.caption: Bella records everything.
scenes.visual_action: Bella sits in a blue-lit confession booth and taps twice on a notebook labeled villa clicks.
scenes.video_prompt: Close-up confessional shot of Bella Blueberry in a blue-lit tropical booth. She speaks directly to camera with sharp eyes, tiny head tilts, and expressive mouth movement. She taps a small notebook twice. Premium stylized 3D fruit character, lifelike facial acting, shallow depth of field.

dialogue: Benny: First challenge. Make a smoothie for the fruit you trust most. Winner gets the Golden Peel and first pick tonight.
scenes.caption: First pick at recoupling.
scenes.visual_action: Benny rolls out a gold bracelet on a velvet tray. Stella looks at it before he announces the prize.
scenes.video_prompt: Benny Banana host presents a gold peel-shaped bracelet on a velvet tray by the villa pool. Contestants lean in. Stella Strawberry glances at the bracelet before the announcement. Bright reality-show staging, clear prop, readable emotion, no text on prop.

dialogue: Marco: Strawberry, lime, and a little salt. That is Stella's drink.
Stella: How would you know that?
Marco: Lucky guess.
scenes.caption: Lucky guess?
scenes.visual_action: Marco mixes Stella's exact favorite drink without asking. Stella smiles, then hides the smile behind her hand.
scenes.video_prompt: Mango Marco mixes a strawberry-lime smoothie at a tropical bar. Stella Strawberry reacts with a private smile and hides it behind her hand. Camera cuts between hands, drink, Stella's eyes, Marco's nervous grin.

dialogue: Gina: That bracelet has mango pulp on it.
Benny: Gina, we are flirting, not doing forensics.
scenes.caption: Why was the prize already touched?
scenes.visual_action: Gina tilts the Golden Peel bracelet toward the sun. A tiny orange smear glows on the clasp. Benny snatches the tray back too fast.
scenes.video_prompt: Gina Grape reveals a tiny orange smear on the gold bracelet clasp. Fast reality-TV zoom. Benny Banana snatches the tray back too quickly. Characters react with visible eye darts and hand gestures.

dialogue: Marco: My smoothie goes to Stella.
Perry: You have known her for eight minutes.
Marco: Some fruit ripens fast.
scenes.caption: The villa turns.
scenes.visual_action: Marco gives Stella the smoothie. The cast laughs except Bella. Stella takes the drink with both hands, almost sentimental, then remembers the cameras.
scenes.video_prompt: Poolside challenge reaction shot. Marco hands Stella a smoothie. Stella takes it with both hands and almost looks sentimental before resetting for the cameras. Bella watches without laughing. Warm villa lighting, character consistency.

dialogue: Bella: The booth door clicked at 2:13 a.m. Production said nobody was inside. But someone ordered two mango mocktails at 2:16.
scenes.caption: 2:13 a.m. booth click.
scenes.visual_action: Bella plays a tiny audio recorder. We hear two clicks and a faint laugh. Cut to the empty smoothie bar at night.
scenes.video_prompt: Bella Blueberry holds a tiny audio recorder in a confessional. Cutaway to empty smoothie bar at night with moonlit pool reflections. Mysterious but playful. No readable UI text required.

dialogue: Stella: You said nobody would find the receipt.
Marco: I said nobody would care if we acted normal.
scenes.caption: They knew each other.
scenes.visual_action: Stella and Marco whisper beside the pool. Marco reaches for Stella's wrist, revealing a faint bracelet mark.
scenes.video_prompt: Private poolside whisper scene at night. Stella Strawberry and Mango Marco stand close near candles. Marco reaches gently toward Stella's wrist; a faint bracelet mark is visible. Emotional tension, subtle hand acting.

dialogue: Benny: Before first pick, any final truths?
Bella: Yeah. Ask the smoothie printer.
scenes.caption: Ask the printer.
scenes.visual_action: Bella raises the wet receipt. The villa goes quiet. Stella looks at Benny instead of the receipt.
scenes.video_prompt: Night villa ceremony around the pool. Bella raises a wet receipt. Everyone freezes. Stella looks at Benny Banana, not the receipt. Slow push-in, dramatic silence, high-detail humanoid fruit cast.

dialogue: Stella: Marco did come early. But he did not invite himself.
Marco: Stella, don't.
scenes.caption: He did not invite himself.
scenes.visual_action: Stella steps into the ceremony circle. Her sweet smile drops. The camera moves from Stella to Marco to Benny.
scenes.video_prompt: Stella Strawberry steps into a ceremony circle by the pool. Her expression changes from sweet to cold. Marco reaches out, worried. Camera pans to Benny Banana, whose host smile is too fixed.

dialogue: Gina: Everybody is reading the drink order. Nobody is reading the signature.
scenes.caption: BENNY B.
scenes.visual_action: Gina turns the receipt over. There is a signature line. It reads Benny B.
scenes.video_prompt: Gina Grape turns over a wet receipt in a dramatic close-up. The cast leans in. The signature line reveals Benny B. Use a prop close-up, hand motion, and shocked reaction cuts. Make the signature visually clear if possible.

dialogue: Benny: Tomorrow night, we find out who came for love... and who came for instructions.
Stella: Then start with your own.
scenes.caption: Part 2 starts with Benny.
scenes.visual_action: Benny smiles too long. Marco reaches for the receipt, Stella pulls it away, and the Golden Peel bracelet drops into the pool.
scenes.video_prompt: Benny Banana smiles too long under ceremony lights. Marco reaches for the receipt, Stella pulls it away, and the Golden Peel bracelet falls into the pool with a splash. Cut mid-motion for a loopable cliffhanger.

paid_render_priority.reason: Tests two-character acting, human-like body language, receipt prop, and hook clarity.
Tests expressive close-up face, mouth movement, eyes, and performance-driven monologue.
Tests hand motion, prop reveal, readable evidence, and reaction cuts.
